title: senecio × marceri
intro: Senecio × marceri, also known as the hybrid or Tassy Rudy, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and diaphoretic effects, which help in relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The health benefits of Senecio × marceri include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antiseptic, making it a popular choice in herbal remedies. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used to treat various health conditions, including bronchitis, asthma, and skin issues.
